title: checklist fill
description: Per-checkpoint fill for the proposal-preparation checklist workbook. Maps the completed review findings onto the canonical 235 rubric checkpoints (scripts/data/checklist.json). Consumed by scripts/build_checklist.py to populate the Durum / Kanit / Notlar columns.

id.description: Canonical checkpoint id, e.g. EXC-01 / IMP-01 / IMPL-01 (must match scripts/data/checklist.json).

status.description: Maps to Durum: adequate->✅ Addressed, partial->⚠️ Partially Addressed, missing->❌ Not Addressed, na->➖ N/A.

citation.description: Kanit / Bolum ref. column: a short quoted excerpt or precise section/page/table/figure reference from the proposal (reuse the finding's evidence, trimmed). Prefer a direct quote in double quotes plus a ref, e.g. "...quote..." (Sec 1.2.3, Table 8, p.14).

note.description: Notlar / Aksiyon column: one short reviewer note (condensed assessment / action). Empty for clean 'adequate' checkpoints is acceptable.
